conjecture_title: Open problem: improved quantitative rank bounds
paper_title: Rank of matrices with entries from a multiplicative group
summary: Alon and Solymosi prove rank lower bounds of order $\log n$ (with weak polynomial dependence on the multiplicative-group rank $r$ and dimension $d$) via the Evertse–Schlickewei–Schmidt Subspace Theorem, and pose obtaining sharper quantitative bounds as an explicit open problem. No follow-up paper improving these bounds, nor any resolution of the special powers-of-2 instance, was found in a wide web search spanning 2021–2026.
search_queries: Alon Solymosi rank matrices multiplicative group powers of two 2109.00618
rank matrix entries multiplicative group lower bound log n arxiv 2021 2022 2023
rank matrix off-diagonal powers of two sharper bounds quantitative 2022 2023 2024 2025
Alon Solymosi subspace theorem rank multiplicative group improved bound cite 2022 2023 2024 2025
notes: The source paper appeared in IMRN 2023 (Vol. 2023, Issue 14, pp. 12383–12399). The open problem asks for better bounds than roughly $\log n \leq r d^8$, highlighting the case where all off-diagonal entries are integer powers of 2 as a concrete open instance. No follow-up resolving or improving these bounds was found in the indexed literature.
